title: oreogrammitis excelsa
intro: Oreogrammitis excelsa, also known as the Golden Birdwing Fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis excelsa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and usage may vary due to its rarity and limited research.
